channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [巴以冲突] IRAQ → ISRAEL : Fight with artillery and tanks (Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: IRAQ / ISRAEL. Location: Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] LEBANON → nan : Occupy territory (Beaufort Castle, Nabatî, Lebanon)
item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: LEBANON / nan. Location: Beaufort Castle, Nabatî, Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → IRAN : Fight with artillery and tanks (Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: ISRAEL / IRAN. Location: Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] IRAN → MEDIA : Fight with artillery and tanks (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: IRAN / MEDIA. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → AZERBAIJANI : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Baku, Baki*, Azerbaijan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / AZERBAIJANI. Location: Baku, Baki*, Azerbaijan. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: ISRAEL / BAHRAIN. Location: Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: REBEL / MEDIA. Location: Kaziranga, Assam, India. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: RUSSIA / nan. Location: New York, United States. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: GERMAN / RUSSIA. Location: Japan. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / nan. Location: Donbas, Ukraine (general), Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Employ aerial weapons. Actors: nan / ISRAEL. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Sexually assault. Actors: RETURNEE / nan. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.
